message.content: Read the image file at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/.claude/tiles/figma-018.png and describe what the Extract/Extrato screen looks like in detail - layout, components, sections, data shown, colors, etc.

content.text:
⊰IUTP

Let me read the image file to examine the Extract/Extrato screen design.

⊰IUTP

## Extract/Extrato Screen - Detailed Description

Based on the Figma design, here's a comprehensive breakdown of the Extract screen:

### Header Section
- Back button (left arrow) and hamburger menu (three horizontal lines)
- Center-aligned title: "Extrato" (Portuguese for "Statement/Extract")
- Status bar showing time (9:41), signal strength, WiFi, and battery

### Points Summary Card (Top Section)
- Rounded container with light gray/white background
- **Left side:** Pink/magenta hand-with-heart icon
- **Left column:**
  - "Pontos disponíveis" (Available Points) with an info icon (?)
  - "Pontos a liberar" (Points to Release) in gray subtext
- **Right column (Values):**
  - "25.720" in bold (available points)
  - "350 pts" (points to release)

### Lançamentos Section (Transactions Section)
- Section title "Lançamentos" in bold
- Divider line below title

#### Search & Filter Bar
- "Voucher" input field (search/filter)
- Search icon (magnifying glass) on the right
- Filter/settings icon (sliders) on the far right

#### Tabbed Navigation
- Three tabs under the search bar:
  - "Todos" (All) - **Active** with pink/magenta underline
  - "A liberar" (To Release)
  - "A expirar" (To Expire)

### Transaction List
Grouped by date, showing voucher transactions:

**2 de novembro (November 2nd)**
- Fuel pump icon (light gray circular background)
- "Voucher para abastecimento" (Fuel voucher)
- "-1.000 pontos" (Points deducted) with pink accent
- "Usados" (Used) status
- Right arrow indicator for navigation

**7 de outubro (October 7th)**
- Same fuel pump icon
- "Voucher para abastecimento"
- "-1.200 pontos" with "Usados" status
- Right arrow

**28 de agosto (August 28th)**
- Fuel pump icon
- "Voucher para abastecimento"
- "-780 pontos" with "Usados" status
- Right arrow

### Color Palette
- Primary action color: Pink/magenta (#E91E63 or similar)
- Text: Dark gray/black for primary content
- Secondary text: Medium gray for labels
- Background: Light gray/white for containers
- Icons: Light gray circular backgrounds

### Layout Pattern
- Vertical scrollable list with date-grouped sections
- Each transaction is a horizontal row with icon, text, amount, status, and navigation chevron
- Clean whitespace between sections
- Responsive padding and margins

This design follows a typical transaction/statement layout with a summary card at top, filterable transaction history, and date-based grouping—consistent with fintech UX patterns.
